title: plagiobothrys pedicellaris
intro: Plagiobothrys pedicellaris, also known as smallflower popcorn flower or small-flowered popcorn flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help to reduce pain and inflammation. The health benefits associated with Plagiobothrys pedicellaris include potential relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as protection against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, are used to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
